whenToUse.summary: Sells access to a recurring subscription — membership site, SaaS, newsletter, or info-product continuity. Often led in with a free trial, $1 trial, or free-plus-shipping box. Stick rate improves when deployed as a SECOND funnel after buyers have already bonded with the Attractive Character. A VSL or sales page sells the subscription; member account creation happens on the thank-you page with an automated content drip.
goals: Add predictable recurring revenue (MRR) to the value ladder
Convert existing buyers into members (stick rate)
Onboard members and drip content automatically
signals: Offer is recurring (monthly/annual) rather than one-time
There is gated content, software, or a community to deliver continuously
Best deployed to an audience that already bought / already bonded
antiSignals: One-time digital product -> SLO or Sales Letter / VSL Funnel
Free/just-shipping physical front end -> 2-Step Tripwire (can lead INTO continuity)
Deeply discounted one-time deal -> Daily Deal Funnel

pageStructure.purpose: Sell the recurring membership, framing the ongoing transformation. Lead with a free trial, $1 trial, or free-plus-shipping box to lower the join barrier.
keyElements: Headline framing the ongoing transformation (not a one-time fix)
VSL or sales copy selling the subscription value over time
What members get each month (recurring value stack)
FAQ on billing cadence and cancellation
widgets: Video embed (Vercel-built page if VSL) or GHL-compatible HTML
Skill 44: CTA routing to the recurring order/checkout step

pageStructure.purpose: Collect payment on a recurring billing schedule (with trial logic if used) and optionally an order bump (annual upgrade or add-on).
keyElements: Recurring subscription order form (trial -> recurring rebill)
Optional ORDER BUMP (annual prepay discount / add-on)
Plan selector (monthly vs annual) if applicable
Trial terms + first-charge date clearly stated
widgets: Skill 44: Order Form configured for recurring billing / subscription

pageStructure.page: Member Account Creation / Welcome Thank-You Page
pageStructure.purpose: Create the member login, deliver first access, and trigger the automated content drip and onboarding sequence.
widgets: GHL Memberships: member account creation + content drip setup

primaryPersona.script: Attractive Character + Soap Opera Sequence (bonding) + Value Ladder
primaryPersona.role: Governs stick rate — continuity converts best after bonding; the Soap Opera Sequence onboards and the Attractive Character keeps members engaged

salesScript.script: VSL or Sales Letter selling continuity — Perfect Webinar or Star/Story/Solution framing the ongoing transformation
salesScript.why: The membership sale must sell the recurring transformation over time, not a single deliverable; the Perfect Webinar / Star-Story-Solution structures both work.

supportingPersonas.script: SB7 — customer = Hero on a continuing journey; the membership is the Plan/Guide
supportingPersonas.role: Frames the subscription as the customer's ongoing success path

supportingPersonas.script: Trial-offer framing, recurring-value stacking, cancellation/objection copy
supportingPersonas.role: Writes the offer page, trial terms, and retention copy
Used when the continuity is a coaching/mastermind membership — structures the tiers

copyFramework.notes: Blackbook governs the bonding + stick rate (Soap Opera Sequence onboarding, Attractive Character retention). StoryBrand frames the ongoing journey; Copywriting Secrets writes the trial and retention copy; Coach Builder structures tiers when it's a coaching membership. Deploy as a SECOND funnel after buyers bond for the best stick rate.

ghlBuild.funnelType: GHL Funnel (3 steps) + GHL Membership area
skill6Steps: Create Funnel -> name with client prefix -> Create
Add New Step 1 = 'Sales / VSL Page (Subscription Offer)'
Add New Step 2 = 'Order / Checkout Page (Recurring Billing)'
Add New Step 3 = 'Member Account Creation / Welcome Thank-You'
Build the gated Membership area (GHL Memberships) and the content drip
skill44Widgets: Order Form configured for recurring/subscription billing (with trial) on Step 2
Optional Order Bump (annual upgrade) on Step 2
GHL Memberships: account creation + drip on Step 3
products: Recurring/subscription product in GHL Payments (trial -> rebill)
Optional annual prepay / add-on bump product
ghlBuild.notes: Use a GHL recurring product (subscription) with trial logic; member account creation and content drip use GHL Memberships, set up in advance. Pre-build the order form, tags, membership offer, and workflows via Skill 44 (or GHL MCP/API). The sales page can be GHL-compatible HTML in the code block, or Vercel-built if it's a heavy VSL.
